actions.script: var socialBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.ds-sign-in-form__social-button'); var hasGoogleSvg = false; var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { if (btns[i].querySelector('path[fill="#4285f4"]')) { hasGoogleSvg = true; break; } } if (socialBtns.length > 0 || hasGoogleSvg || window.location.pathname.indexOf('sign_in') !== -1) { return 'not_logged_in'; } return 'logged_in';
